steps: Go to https://dashboard.tawk.to and log in or create a free tawk.to account
Navigate to Administration > REST API (or go directly to https://dashboard.tawk.to/#/admin/api-keys)
Note: The REST API is currently in private beta — if the API key page is not visible, submit an access request via the REST API help article at https://help.tawk.to/article/rest-api
Once you have access, click 'Create API Key' or copy the displayed API key
Use the API key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header: 'Authorization: Bearer <your-api-key>'

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your tawk.to REST API key from the Administration panel. Used as a Bearer token.

notes: tawk.to is free with no monthly fees — revenue comes from optional paid agent/features add-ons
The REST API is currently in private beta — access may need to be requested via https://help.tawk.to/article/rest-api
Keep the API key secret as it grants access to all properties on your account
The JavaScript widget API (for embedding chat on websites) is separate from the REST API
Properties (websites/apps) each have their own property ID required for most REST API calls

test_endpoint.description: List properties to verify the API key is working
